states.name: Zamal
states.title: Warrior of the Eagle
states.description: From a distant place, from a distant time, Zamal is a hero, a legend among his people. He fought for their freedom viciously, and welcomed glorious death with every battle. In his home, he died fighting nine gladiators. However, upon his death, he appeared elsewhere.

states.name: Zamal
states.title: Warrior of the Eagle
states.description: He doesn't know why he's in Erden, except that it's tied to his skill as a warrior. Now, Zamal lives, fights, and dies time and again. Every time, he appears in another world as a liberating force, as a paragon of honorable, glorious, bloody combat.
